home.hero: Not sure if it's a scam?
home.heroSub: Upload a screenshot or paste a suspicious message. We'll check it for you in seconds.
home.ctaScanDesc: Upload a suspicious WhatsApp, SMS, or email screenshot
home.ctaUrlDesc: Paste a URL or link that you find suspicious
home.ctaPhoneDesc: Enter a phone number to check against scam databases

scan.title: Scan Suspicious Message
scan.uploadDesc: Drag & drop image here, or tap to select
scan.pastePlaceholder: Paste the WhatsApp, SMS, or email message here...

report.title: Risk Report
report.reportNumberDesc: Help protect the community from this scam number
report.reportAnonymous: This information is stored anonymously to help other users.
report.reportSuccess: Your report helps protect the community from scams.

verdicts.safe: Safe — No signs of fraud detected
verdicts.low: Low Risk — Be cautious, but likely safe
verdicts.medium: Medium Risk — Be alert, some suspicious signs found
verdicts.high: High Risk — This is most likely a scam
verdicts.critical: Critical Danger — This is almost certainly a scam!

actionItems.dontTransfer: DO NOT transfer money to any account
actionItems.screenshot: Take a screenshot of this conversation as evidence
actionItems.blockSender: Block the sender on the relevant platform
actionItems.reportPolice: File a police report at the nearest station
actionItems.checkSemakMule: Check the number on PDRM's Semak Mule portal
actionItems.dontClick: DO NOT click any links in this message
actionItems.dontShareOTP: DO NOT share your OTP or passwords
actionItems.verifyIdentity: Verify the sender's identity through official channels

ai.langInstruction: Respond with explanation and action_plan in English (clear, non-technical, empathetic language).
ai.fallbackExplanation: Sorry, AI analysis could not be completed fully. Please try again.

macauScam.name: Macau Scam
macauScam.desc: Scammers impersonate authorities (police, courts, LHDN) and demand money to 'settle a case'.

loveScam.name: Love Scam
loveScam.desc: Scammers build fake romantic relationships to extract money from victims.

jobScam.name: Job Scam
jobScam.desc: Fake job offers that require upfront payments or deposits.

investmentScam.name: Investment Scam
investmentScam.desc: Fake investment schemes promising unrealistically high returns.

parcelScam.name: Parcel Scam
parcelScam.desc: Scammers claim a package is held and require payment for release.

phishing.name: Phishing
phishing.desc: Fake links that mimic official websites to steal personal information.

loanScam.name: Loan Scam
loanScam.desc: Fake loan offers that require 'processing fees' upfront.

ecommerce.name: E-Commerce Scam
ecommerce.desc: Sale of fake or non-existent goods through online platforms.

errors.fileTooBig: File is too large. Maximum size is 10MB.
errors.invalidFormat: File format not supported. Please use PNG, JPG, or WEBP.
errors.networkError: Network issue. Please check your internet connection.
errors.analysisError: Error during analysis. Please try again.
errors.invalidUrl: Invalid URL. Please enter a valid URL.
errors.invalidPhone: Invalid phone number. Please use Malaysian format (01X-XXXXXXX).

footer.disclaimer: SkamGuard uses AI for analysis. Results are for reference only and do not constitute legal advice.
footer.emergency: If you have been a victim of fraud, call NSRC 997 immediately.
